name: White Meat Ravioli
recipeInstructions:
-----------------------------------SAUCE-----------------------------------
1. In a large mixing bowl, combine olive oil (2 tbsp), crushed tomatoes (1 c), minced garlic (2 cloves), chopped basil (1 tb), and simmer for 10-15 minutes.
2. Fill ravioli with the sauce mixture.
3. Stir-fry sliced scallions (4 tbsp) and minced garlic (2 cloves) in hot oil over medium heat for about 30 seconds.
